rag_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type annexes in the component type scope
Place implementation annexes in the implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Use visible identifiers from the input AADL model for AGREE references
generic_rules: Maintain the original AADL structure during fusion
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid scopes
Use only identifiers present in the input AADL model
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when adding annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
